title: inula × paiensis
intro: Inula × paiensis, also known as Paio Inula or Japanese Inula, is a hybrid plant species within the Inula genus, resulting from the cross between Inula japonica and Inula britannica. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Inula × paiensis include reducing inflammation and improving symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal supplements and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
